ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentinel_selection_keys" (
  "selection_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection key */,
  "selection_key" TEXT /* The selection key used to select configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selection key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selection key was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "msisdn" TEXT /* The MSISDN associated with the subscription */,
  "is_sms_over_ip_registered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is logged in to the IMS */,
  "registration_records" TEXT /* JSON string of RegistrationRecords for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_orders" (
  "delivery_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery order */,
  "selection_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the selection key used for the delivery order */,
  "delivery_order" TEXT /* The delivery order based on configuration and routing info */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery order */,
  "routing_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the delivery order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_orders_selection_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_key_id") REFERENCES sentinel_selection_keys ("selection_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_handling" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code for the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message associated with the error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Level of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_operator_fields" (
  "network_operator_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network operator field */,
  "selection_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the selection key used for the network operator field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the network operator field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network operator field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network operator field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network operator field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_operator_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_operator_fields_selection_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_key_id") REFERENCES sentinel_selection_keys ("selection_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routing_decisions" (
  "routing_decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each routing decision */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user subscription for the routing decision */,
  "delivery_order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery order for the routing decision */,
  "routing_decision" TEXT /* The routing decision based on user registration and network availability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the routing decision */,
  "routing_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the routing decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the routing decision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the routing decision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("routing_decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routing_decisions_delivery_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_order_id") REFERENCES delivery_orders ("delivery_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routing_decisions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES user_subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "affected_components" TEXT /* List of affected components (e.g., selection keys, delivery orders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the error for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the report resolution (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES error_handling ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES configuration_changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "system_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_log_id")
)
